estimate_basis: SLAM is a core autonomy method; IFR reports China is the largest industrial-robot market with 54% of deployments in 2024 and over 2 million robots in operation.
notes: Autonomous-vehicle, drone and logistics shares require additional product-level validation.
assumption_status: Preliminary directional estimate; not audited; refine with paper-specific market revenue and country value-added data.

paper_or_discovery: Denoising diffusion probabilistic models
value_capture_channel: AI apps; cloud inference; model deployment; creative tools; e-commerce content generation
estimate_basis: Diffusion models are part of generative AI; Stanford AI Index reports China has broad AI research/patent leadership but the US leads in notable model development.
notes: Revenue is strongly shared with US cloud/platform firms and global AI application companies.
assumption_status: Preliminary directional estimate; not audited; refine with paper-specific market revenue and country value-added data.

paper_or_discovery: Human-level control through deep reinforcement learning; Mastering the game of Go with deep neural networks and tree search
value_capture_channel: AI talent/research; robotics; automation; optimization systems
estimate_basis: Deep RL/AlphaGo catalyzed AI interest and research; Stanford AI Index reports China leads in AI research outputs, and IFR reports China leads industrial robot deployment.
notes: Commercial revenue is less direct than transformers or batteries; treat as a soft platform-benefit estimate.
assumption_status: Preliminary directional estimate; not audited; refine with paper-specific market revenue and country value-added data.
